verses.text: The Lamb opens the first seal: 'a white horse,' its rider with a bow and crown, 'conquering, and to conquer.' First seal. Conquest goes forth at the Lamb's command.
The Lamb opens the first seal: 'a white horse,' its rider with a bow and crown, 'conquering, and to conquer.' First seal. Conquest goes forth at the Lamb's command.
The second seal: 'a red horse,' whose rider takes 'peace from the earth,' that men should kill one another. War. The world is given over to slaughter.
The second seal: 'a red horse,' whose rider takes 'peace from the earth,' that men should kill one another. War. The world is given over to slaughter.
The third seal: 'a black horse,' its rider with balances, scarce bread at high price. Famine. Want follows war upon the earth.
The third seal: 'a black horse,' its rider with balances, scarce bread at high price. Famine. Want follows war upon the earth.
The fourth seal: 'a pale horse,' his rider 'Death, and Hell followed,' to kill by sword, hunger, and beasts. Death rides. A fourth of the earth falls to judgment.
The fourth seal: 'a pale horse,' his rider 'Death, and Hell followed,' to kill by sword, hunger, and beasts. Death rides. A fourth of the earth falls to judgment.
The fifth seal: under the altar 'the souls of them that were slain' cry, 'How long?' White robes are given, and they rest a little. Martyrs cry. The slain await God's righteous vengeance.
The fifth seal: under the altar 'the souls of them that were slain' cry, 'How long?' White robes are given, and they rest a little. Martyrs cry. The slain await God's righteous vengeance.
The fifth seal: under the altar 'the souls of them that were slain' cry, 'How long?' White robes are given, and they rest a little. Martyrs cry. The slain await God's righteous vengeance.
The sixth seal: a great earthquake, the sun black, the moon as blood, stars falling, heaven departing 'as a scroll.' Shaken creation. The whole world reels before God's wrath.
The sixth seal: a great earthquake, the sun black, the moon as blood, stars falling, heaven departing 'as a scroll.' Shaken creation. The whole world reels before God's wrath.
The sixth seal: a great earthquake, the sun black, the moon as blood, stars falling, heaven departing 'as a scroll.' Shaken creation. The whole world reels before God's wrath.
Kings and slaves hide, crying, 'hide us... for the great day of his wrath is come; and who shall be able to stand?' No escape. None can endure the Lamb's wrath.
